allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add real-time SignalR updates and config hot-reload

- Add ConfigFileWatcherService for automatic config.json hot-reload
- Add runtime configuration API endpoint for frontend
- Add SignalR broadcasts for testing state and comment updates
- Make comment column editable inline \(click to edit, Enter to save\)
- Hardcode ports \(backend: 5000, frontend: 3002\) - no .env needed
- Add config reload banner UI component
- Add STARTUP-AND-CONFIGURATION-GUIDE.md documentation

Real-time updates now sync across all connected clients:
- Testing state \(Start/Stop Testing button\)
- Comment changes
- IO state and result changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
